LAW AND MOTION 302, JUL-24-2023. HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MANUEL ARANDA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. MATTER IS DISCUSSED. UPON CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION REGARDING THE STATUS OF SETTLEMENT, THE COURT APPROVES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. A FINAL APPROVAL HEARING IS SET FOR OCT-03-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED.
